Social Messenger Integration

Facebook Messenger & Instagram DM — Bidirectional Messaging in Odoo Discuss

Receive and reply to Facebook Messenger and Instagram Direct Messages directly from Odoo. All conversations appear in the Chatter and are linked to your Odoo contacts. No external middleware needed.

Key Features

📩

Real-Time Incoming Messages

Messages from Facebook Messenger and Instagram DMs are delivered instantly to Odoo via Meta Webhooks. No polling, no delays.

💬

Reply from Odoo

Respond to customers directly from the conversation form. Messages are sent via Meta Send API and logged in Chatter.

👥

Auto-Link Contacts

Conversations are automatically linked to existing contacts. Create new contacts from social profiles with one click.

Complete Feature List

  • Facebook Messenger — full send & receive
  • Instagram DMs — full send & receive
  • Odoo Chatter integration — every message logged
  • Contact auto-creation from sender profiles
  • Text + image attachments supported
  • Multi-account — connect multiple pages/accounts
  • Webhook signature verification for security
  • User & Manager security groups
  • Conversation search & filters by platform, contact
  • No external dependencies — uses Odoo's built-in libraries

Quick Setup (5 Minutes)

  1. Create a free Meta App at developers.facebook.com
  2. Add the Messenger and/or Instagram products to your Meta App
  3. Generate a Page Access Token with pages_messaging permission
  4. In Odoo, go to Social Messenger → Configuration → Social Accounts and enter your credentials
  5. Copy the Webhook URL from Odoo and paste it into Meta Developer Console → Webhooks
  6. Subscribe to messages and messaging_postbacks events
  7. Click Test Connection — you are ready!

Requirements

Odoo version: 19.0 (Community & Enterprise)
Meta Developer App: Free at developers.facebook.com
Facebook Page: Connected to your Meta App
Instagram: Business or Creator account linked to your FB Page
HTTPS: Your Odoo instance must be publicly accessible with HTTPS (Odoo Online / Odoo.sh fulfil this by default)
External Python libraries: None — uses only Odoo standard libraries

Need Help?

Open a support ticket via the Odoo Apps Store or contact the author directly.
